  "findings": [
    "Misinterpretation of APWA uniform color codes for utility markings",
    "High risk of utility strike due to incorrect identification of marked lines"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop excavation work in the affected area immediately",
    "Re-verify all utility markings with the local 811 one-call center and utility operators",
    "Remark the site using the correct APWA color standard before resuming work"
  ],
  "rationale": "Misinterpreting utility mark colors (such as confusing electric, gas, water, sewer, or communications) violates standard APWA/CGA guidelines and poses an immediate, critical safety hazard for utility strikes during excavation.",
  "references": [
    "CGA Best Practices Version 18.0, Appendix B: Uniform Color Code",
    "ANSI Standard Z535.1"
  ]
}
